name: doctrine
description: Documentation placement doctrine: every repository document lives in one of six lifetime-based buckets under docs/. A SessionStart hook creates the buckets when missing, a UserPromptSubmit directive steers classification and records decisions, measurements and operational changes as they happen, and a PreToolUse gate refuses writes landing under docs/ outside the buckets. Scope is docs/ only — no content audits, no post-hoc doc review.
